benefits.description: Visceral fat reduction; hard belly softened, improved breathing, ability to tie shoes and put on socks without difficulty

side_effects.description: Unspecified sides on continuous dosing; resolved when switched to 5 on/2 off schedule

protocol_notes: Initially on 7 days per week dosing which caused severe side effects. Switched to 5 days on, 2 days off protocol. Side effects nearly caused discontinuation but persisted through almost 3 months before visceral fat loss became apparent.
